Strategy Inc. plans to raise $21 billion through preferred stock offering for Bitcoin acquisition.
news.summary: Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ:MSTR) recently announced plans to offer up to $21 billion in preferred stock to fund Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) purchases. The sales agreement includes issuing 8.00% Series A perpetual strike preferred stock STRK with a par value of $0.001 per share, convertible into Strategy's class A common stock. The proceeds will mainly be used for Bitcoin acquisitions, with some funds reserved for working capital and general corporate needs. This offering is structured as an at-the-market (ATM) program, enabling Strategy to sell shares as needed.

news.headline: Trump's executive order dashes XRP's hopes for inclusion in U.S. strategic crypto reserve after promising start; XRP surged 36% initially.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency community was taken aback as an executive order from President Donald Trump shattered the hopes of Ripple and its backers. Despite investing millions in political contributions to advocate for XRP's inclusion in a U.S. sovereign crypto reserve, the company faced disappointment as Trump reversed his initial stance. "Crypto Czar" David Sacks shared the news, revealing that XRP would not be part of any strategic reserve as promised. Trump's announcement on March 2 had caused XRP's price to surge by 36% within an hour, but the actual executive order unveiled a different reality. Instead of being recognized as a prized reserve asset, XRP was labeled a "Stockpile Asset," signifying a significant setback for the cryptocurrency.

news.headline: BlackRock's Rieder reports a move to fixed income investments.
Inventor from Escondido, Calif. invented SOUL TAKER card game as immersive alternative, released on March 10, 2025.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Escondido, Calif., shared the creation of the SOUL TAKER, an innovative game that aims to revolutionize traditional battle-style card games. The inventor, who is a game developer, designed the game to offer players a more immersive and engaging experience. The SOUL TAKER provides a fun and entertaining alternative in the gaming world, with unique features and gameplay that sets it apart from existing options. This new invention has garnered attention for its ability to captivate players and offer a fresh perspective on the gaming industry.

news.headline: Protagonist Therapeutics' stock rose on Monday after positive ANTHEM-UC Phase 2b study results for icotrokinra. Key numbers: response rate of 63.5%, clinical remission rate of 30.2%.
news.summary: Protagonist Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:PTGX) recently disclosed the topline findings from the ANTHEM-UC Phase 2b trial of icotrokinra (JNJ-2113) for adults with moderately to severely active ulcerative colitis. The study, led by Protagonist's partner Johnson & Johnson, successfully achieved its primary objective of clinical response across all icotrokinra dose groups analyzed. Notably, the trial exhibited significant discrepancies compared to placebo in crucial secondary endpoints such as clinical remission, symptomatic remission, and endoscopic improvement by Week 12. All three daily doses of icotrokinra met the primary endpoint of clinical response at Week 12, with the highest dose group recording a response rate of 63.5% versus 27.0% for placebo. Furthermore, 30.2% of patients on the highest icotrokinra dosage demonstrated clinical remission at Week 12, in contrast to 11.1% in the placebo cohort. The rates of clinical remission and response were sustained... Check out the full article on Benzinga.com for further details.

news.headline: Bitcoin falls below $80K as Solana, Dogecoin, and stocks plummet due to inflation concerns and reactions to Trump's recession comments.
news.summary: On Monday, both cryptocurrency prices and stocks are experiencing a decline. Bitcoin, in particular, is plunging as traders respond to President Trump's remarks about a recession. This has led to a significant drop in market values worldwide. The situation is fluid, and investors are closely monitoring the developments. The impact of Trump's comments is evident in the current state of the market, with Bitcoin's value showing a sharp decrease. This has created a sense of uncertainty among traders and investors as they navigate through the fluctuations in the financial landscape.

news.headline: Trump addresses questions on possible recession, hints at changes for economy in "period of transition" amidst tariffs and job cuts.
news.summary: During a recent Fox News interview, President Donald Trump avoided directly addressing questions regarding a potential recession. While conversing with reporters on Air Force One, he refused to entertain the idea of an economic downturn. However, Trump did hint at the likelihood of a recession in 2025, attributing it to a transitional phase where his administration is enacting significant economic changes like tariffs and reducing the federal workforce. When pressed about the possibility of a recession during his Fox News appearance, Trump expressed reluctance to make predictions, stating, “I hate to predict things like that.” He highlighted that his economic policies are geared towards boosting wealth in the country, even though they may necessitate time for full effect. For more insights, the full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

Musk's X faces global outages; users impacted worldwide.
Ukraine's Top Army Commander: There is no risk of encirclement for Kyiv's troops
Ukraine's Top Army Commander: North Korean troops are involved in Russian counter offensive in Kursk
Zelenskiy has arrived in Saudi Arabia's Jeddah - Ukrainian Official
TCN in St. George, Utah, announced advancements to payment solutions to streamline processes for businesses.
news.summary: In St. George, Utah on March 10, 2025, TCN revealed major enhancements to its payment solutions. As a top provider of cloud-based contact center technology for businesses, TCN's latest advancements aim to help enterprises streamline their payment processes and improve customer experience.

news.headline: Chicken Salad Chick to open 36th restaurant in Texas in Missouri City, offering free chicken salad for a year on March 18.
news.summary: A fast casual eatery is set to mark the inauguration of its 36th location in Texas on March 18, with a special promotion of complimentary chicken salad for a year. This establishment, known for its unique focus on chicken salad, is Chicken Salad Chick, the sole fast casual restaurant of its kind in the country. The news was shared on March 10, 2025, with the grand opening event and free offer drawing attention.

news.headline: Strategy lost $21 billion buying bitcoin at $96,458 per coin since November 10, facing consequences.
news.summary: Since November 10, a strategy has spent a total of $21 billion on bitcoin purchases, with an average price per coin of $96,458. This substantial investment has resulted in significant financial consequences for the entity involved.

news.headline: Stripe's rapid growth delays IPO, affecting companies like PayPal, Adyen, Fiserv. Investors beware.
news.summary: Rapidly expanding fintech company Stripe has decided to delay its initial public offering once more. The impressive growth of Stripe is significantly affecting established public companies such as PayPal, Adyen, and Fiserv. The impact of Stripe's expansion on these companies is becoming a major concern in the fintech industry.

news.headline: Expect 13 growth stocks to bounce back from 2025's losses and show strong performance.
Kodak reports Q4/Year End 2024 earnings in Rochester, N.Y.
news.summary: An earnings conference call for the fourth quarter and year-end of 2024 will be held by Eastman Kodak Company in Rochester, New York.

news.headline: Alloy launches AI-powered Fraud Attack Radar providing real-time intelligence to fight fraud. Aims to help financial institutions and fintechs identify and stop attacks.
news.summary: Alloy, a prominent provider of identity and fraud prevention platform, has unveiled its latest offering equipped with actionable AI technology. The solution is designed to assist financial institutions and fintech companies in identifying the sources of attacks and implementing effective measures to combat them. The announcement was made on March 10, 2025, in New York. This development aims to bolster the security measures of businesses in the finance sector by utilizing advanced technologies to thwart potential threats.

news.headline: TRX Gold announces 2024 voting results; welcomes new director. AGM held on Feb 27, 2025.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, TRX Gold Corporation (TSX: TRX) (NYSE American: TRX) shared the outcomes of its Annual General and Special Meeting conducted on February 27, 2025.

news.headline: Ford commits €4.4 billion to support struggling German operations.
ISLE 2025 in Shenzhen featured AI tech, drew 220,000+ visits, pushing new industry trends and ecosystems.
news.summary: The annual ISLE 2025 exhibition, which took place at the Shenzhen World Exhibition and Convention Center from March 7 to 9, was a triumph as Asia's biggest showcase for smart display and system integration. Drawing in more than 220,000 visitors, the event solidified its stature as a premier industry gathering for tech enthusiasts and professionals alike.
